title: holodiscus microphyllus var. glabrescens
intro: Holodiscus microphyllus var. glabrescens, also known as smooth green-leaved or smooth holodiscus, is a variety of the holodiscus microphyllus plant, a flowering shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Holodiscus microphyllus var. glabrescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Holodiscus microphyllus var. glabrescens can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as salves, tinctures, and capsules, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
